source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults undergoing blood-pressure measurement, hypertension assessment, or monitoring, including adults with type 2 diabetes where specified.
source.setting: Primary care, outpatient review, home or ambulatory monitoring, and specialist referral pathways.
source.exclusions: Exact for blood-pressure device technique, clinic measurement, ABPM and HBPM result review, cardiovascular-risk context, monitoring, annual review, and documented high-risk features. Diagnostic conclusions, targets, treatment, medicines, and referrals are not generated or mapped. The postural-hypotension section additionally supports clinician-entered orthostatic blood-pressure documentation without automatic diagnosis or management. source.title: Medicines adherence: involving patients in decisions about prescribed medicines and supporting adherence
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation
source.population: People prescribed medicines and healthcare professionals who prescribe, dispense, or review medicines.
source.setting: Shared medicine decisions, adherence assessment, support, and periodic medicine review.
source.exclusions: Exact for non-judgemental adherence history, missed-dose or medicine-taking behaviour documentation, beliefs, concerns, practical barriers, preferred support, and periodic review. It does not recommend a medicine, dose, change, or adherence intervention automatically.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.8 — non-judgemental adherence assessment and tailored support

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting missed doses, stopping or restarting, intentional or practical barriers, and support preferences without generating an intervention.

items.rationale: CG76 directly supports non-judgemental documentation of recent medicine-taking behaviour, missed doses, intentional or practical barriers, and preferred support without changing treatment.

items.final_wording: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

source.population: People prescribed medicines and healthcare professionals who prescribe, dispense, or review medicines.
source.setting: Shared medicine decisions, adherence assessment, support, and periodic medicine review.
source.exclusions: Exact for non-judgemental adherence history, missed-dose or medicine-taking behaviour documentation, beliefs, concerns, practical barriers, preferred support, and periodic review. It does not recommend a medicine, dose, change, or adherence intervention automatically.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.8 — non-judgemental adherence assessment and tailored support

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting missed doses, stopping or restarting, intentional or practical barriers, and support preferences without generating an intervention.

added_items.rationale: CG76 directly supports non-judgemental documentation of recent medicine-taking behaviour, missed doses, intentional or practical barriers, and preferred support without changing treatment.

added_items.final_wording: Supports clinic, home, or ambulatory blood-pressure monitoring, symptoms, medication and lifestyle discussion, and an annual review without generating targets, treatment, or advice.

source.title: Hypertension in adults: diagnosis and management
source.population: Adults undergoing blood-pressure measurement, hypertension assessment, or monitoring, including adults with type 2 diabetes where specified.
source.setting: Primary care, outpatient review, home or ambulatory monitoring, and specialist referral pathways.
source.exclusions: Exact for blood-pressure device technique, clinic measurement, ABPM and HBPM result review, cardiovascular-risk context, monitoring, annual review, and documented high-risk features. Diagnostic conclusions, targets, treatment, medicines, and referrals are not generated or mapped.
